You are working on the ankidroid/Anki-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 2.171 (commit: 7a65160e).

## Issue to Resolve

Regression: can't select deck in add screen
Also, I can't change decks in the note editor


https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/assets/69634269/91e7b6db-ef3e-4048-b9dd-30545b4405ce

_Originally posted by @BrayanDSO in https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/issues/14171#issuecomment-1697548993_

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/DeckSpinnerSelection.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

1→/*
  2→ * Copyright (c) 2022 Akshay Jadhav <jadhavakshay0701@gmail.com>
  3→ *

 11→ * PARTICULAR PURPOSE. See the GNU General Public License for more details.
 12→ *
 13→ * You should have received a copy of the GNU General Public License along with
 14→ * this program.  If not, see <http://www.gnu.org/licenses/>.
 15→ */
 16→package com.ichi2.anki
 17→
 18→import android.view.MotionEvent
 19→import android.view.View
 20→import android.view.ViewGroup
 21→import android.widget.ArrayAdapter
 22→import android.widget.Spinner
 23→import android.widget.TextView
 24→import androidx.appcompat.app.ActionBar
 25→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.DeckSelectionDialog
 26→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.DeckSelectionDialog.SelectableDeck
 27→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.DeckSelectionDialog.SelectableDeck.Companion.fromCollection
 28→import com.ichi2.anki.widgets.DeckDropDownAdapter
 29→import com.ichi2.libanki.*
 30→import com.ichi2.libanki.Collection
 31→import com.ichi2.utils.FragmentManagerSupplier
 32→import com.ichi2.utils.asFragmentManagerSupplier
 33→import timber.log.Timber
 34→
 35→/**
 36→ * Handles expansion of a [Spinner], allowing a press to display a [DeckSelectionDialog]
 37→ * Responsible for filtering the decks to display in the [DeckSelectionDialog]
 38→ *
 39→ * Populates the spinner with data, and handles display of the selected deck within the spinner control
 40→ *
 41→ * @param spinner
 42→ * The spinner displayed in the activity.
 43→ * Empty at construction. After initialization, it contains in this order:
 44→ * 1. "All decks" if [showAllDecks] is true
 45→ * 2. All decks from [mAllDeckIds].
 46→ * @param showAllDecks Whether the deck selection should allow "All Decks" as an option
 47→ * @param alwaysShowDefault If true, never hide the default deck. If false, match [DeckPicker]'s logic
 48→ * @param showFilteredDecks whether to show filtered decks
 49→ */
 50→class DeckSpinnerSelection(
 51→    private val context: AnkiActivity,
 52→    private val collection: Collection,
 53→    private val spinner: Spinner,
 54→    private val showAllDecks: Boolean,
 55→    private val alwaysShowDefault: Boolean,
 56→    private val showFilteredDecks: Boolean
 57→) {
 58→    /**
 59→     * All of the decks shown to the user.
 60→     */
 61→    private lateinit var mAllDeckIds: ArrayList<Long>
 62→
 63→    private val mFragmentManagerSupplier: FragmentManagerSupplier = context.asFragmentManagerSupplier()
 64→
 65→    lateinit var dropDownDecks: List<DeckNameId>
 66→        private set
 67→    private var mDeckDropDownAdapter: DeckDropDownAdapter? = null
 68→
 69→    fun initializeActionBarDeckSpinner(actionBar: ActionBar) {
 70→        actionBar.setDisplayShowTitleEnabled(false)
 71→
 72→        // Add drop-down menu to select deck to action bar.
 73→        dropDownDecks = computeDropDownDecks(includeFiltered = showFilteredDecks)
 74→        mAllDeckIds = ArrayList(dropDownDecks.size)
 75→        for (d in dropDownDecks) {
 76→            val thisDid = d.id
 77→            mAllDeckIds.add(thisDid)
 78→        }
 79→        mDeckDropDownAdapter = DeckDropDownAdapter(context, dropDownDecks)
 80→        spinner.adapter = mDeckDropDownAdapter
 81→        setSpinnerListener()
 82→    }
 83→
 84→    fun initializeNoteEditorDeckSpinner() {
 85→        dropDownDecks = computeDropDownDecks(includeFiltered = false)
 86→        val deckNames = ArrayList<String>(dropDownDecks.size)
 87→        mAllDeckIds = ArrayList(dropDownDecks.size)
 88→        for (d in dropDownDecks) {
 89→            val currentName = d.name
 90→            deckNames.add(currentName)
 91→        }
 92→        val noteDeckAdapter: ArrayAdapter<String?> = object : ArrayAdapter<String?>(context, R.layout.multiline_spinner_item, deckNames as List<String?>) {
 93→            override fun getDropDownView(position: Int, convertView: View?, parent: ViewGroup): View {
 94→                // Cast the drop down items (popup items) as text view
 95→                val tv = super.getDropDownView(position, convertView, parent) as TextView
 96→
 97→                // If this item is selected
 98→                if (position == spinner.selectedItemPosition) {
 99→                    tv.setBackgroundColor(context.getColor(R.color.note_editor_selected_item_background))
100→                    tv.setTextColor(context.getColor(R.color.note_editor_selected_item_text))
101→                }
102→
103→                // Return the modified view
104→                return tv
105→            }
106→        }
107→        spinner.adapter = noteDeckAdapter
108→        setSpinnerListener()
109→    }
110→
111→    /**
112→     * @return All decks, except maybe default if it should be hidden.
113→     */
114→    fun computeDropDownDecks(includeFiltered: Boolean): List<DeckNameId> {
115→        return collection.decks.allNamesAndIds(skipEmptyDefault = true, includeFiltered = includeFiltered)
116→    }
117→
118→    fun setSpinnerListener() {
119→        spinner.setOnTouchListener { _: View?, motionEvent: MotionEvent ->
120→            if (motionEvent.action == MotionEvent.ACTION_UP) {
121→                displayDeckSelectionDialog(collection)
122→            }
123→            true
124→        }
125→        setSpinnerVisibility(View.VISIBLE)
126→    }
127→
128→    /**
129→     * Move the selected deck in the spinner to [deckId].
130→     * Timber if [deckId] is not an id of a known deck.
131→     * @param deckId The ID of the deck to select
132→     */
133→    fun updateDeckPosition(deckId: DeckId) {
134→        val position = mAllDeckIds.indexOf(deckId)
135→        if (position != -1) {
136→            spinner.setSelection(position)
137→        } else {
138→            Timber.w("updateDeckPosition() error :: deckId=%d, position=%d", deckId, position)
139→        }
140→    }
141→
142→    fun notifyDataSetChanged() {
143→        mDeckDropDownAdapter!!.notifyDataSetChanged()
144→    }
145→
146→    fun setEnabledActionBarSpinner(enabled: Boolean) {
147→        spinner.isEnabled = enabled
148→    }
149→
150→    fun setSpinnerVisibility(view: Int) {
151→        spinner.visibility = view
152→    }
153→
154→    /**
155→     * Iterates the drop down decks, and selects the one matching the given id.
156→     * @param deckId The deck id to be selected.
157→     * @param setAsCurrentDeck If true, deckId will be set as the current deck id of Collection
158→     * (this means the deck selected here will continue to appear in any future Activity whose
159→     * display data is loaded from Collection's current deck). If false, deckId will not be set as
160→     * the current deck id of Collection.
161→     * @return True if selection succeeded.
162→     */
163→    fun selectDeckById(deckId: DeckId, setAsCurrentDeck: Boolean): Boolean {
164→        return if (deckId == ALL_DECKS_ID) {
165→            selectAllDecks()
166→        } else {
167→            selectDeck(deckId, setAsCurrentDeck)
168→        }
169→    }
170→
171→    /**
172→     * select in the spinner deck with id
173→     * @param deckId The deck id to search (not ALL_DECKS_ID)
174→     * @param setAsCurrentDeck whether this deck should be selected in the collection (if it exists)
175→     * @return whether it was found
176→     */
177→    private fun selectDeck(deckId: DeckId, setAsCurrentDeck: Boolean): Boolean {
178→        for (dropDownDeckIdx in mAllDeckIds.indices) {
179→            if (mAllDeckIds[dropDownDeckIdx] == deckId) {
180→                val position = if (showAllDecks) dropDownDeckIdx + 1 else dropDownDeckIdx
181→                spinner.setSelection(position)
182→                if (setAsCurrentDeck) {
183→                    collection.decks.select(deckId)
184→                }
185→                return true
186→            }
187→        }
188→        return false
189→    }
190→
191→    /**
192→     * Select all decks. Must be called only if [showAllDecks].
193→     * @return whether selection was a success.
194→     */
195→    fun selectAllDecks(): Boolean {
196→        if (!showAllDecks) {
197→            CrashReportService.sendExceptionReport("selectAllDecks was called while `showAllDecks is false`", "DeckSpinnerSelection:selectAllDecks")
198→            return false
199→        }
200→        spinner.setSelection(0)
201→        return true
202→    }
203→
204→    /**
205→     * Displays a [DeckSelectionDialog]
206→     */
207→    fun displayDeckSelectionDialog(col: Collection?) {
208→        val decks = fromCollection(col!!, includeFiltered = false).toMutableList()
209→        if (showAllDecks) {
210→            decks.add(SelectableDeck(ALL_DECKS_ID, context.resources.getString(R.string.card_browser_all_decks)))
211→        }
212→        val dialog = DeckSelectionDialog.newInstance(context.getString(R.string.search_deck), null, false, decks)
213→        AnkiActivity.showDialogFragment(mFragmentManagerSupplier.getFragmentManager(), dialog)
214→    }
215→
216→    companion object {
217→        const val ALL_DECKS_ID = 0L
218→    }
219→}
220→

100→/**
101→ * Allows the user to edit a note, for instance if there is a typo. A card is a presentation of a note, and has two
102→ * sides: a question and an answer. Any number of fields can appear on each side. When you add a note to Anki, cards
103→ * which show that note are generated. Some models generate one card, others generate more than one.
104→ *
105→ * @see [the Anki Desktop manual](https://docs.ankiweb.net/getting-started.html.cards)
106→ */
107→@KotlinCleanup("Go through the class and select elements to fix")
108→@KotlinCleanup("see if we can lateinit")
109→class NoteEditor : AnkiActivity(), DeckSelectionListener, SubtitleListener, TagsDialogListener {
110→    /** Whether any change are saved. E.g. multimedia, new card added, field changed and saved. */
111→    private var changed = false
112→    private var isTagsEdited = false
113→    private var isFieldEdited = false
114→
115→    /**
116→     * Flag which forces the calling activity to rebuild it's definition of current card from scratch
117→     */
118→    private var mReloadRequired = false
119→
120→    /**
121→     * Broadcast that informs us when the sd card is about to be unmounted
122→     */
123→    private var mUnmountReceiver: BroadcastReceiver? = null
124→    private var mFieldsLayoutContainer: LinearLayout? = null
125→    private var mMediaRegistration: MediaRegistration? = null
126→    private var mTagsDialogFactory: TagsDialogFactory? = null
127→    private var mTagsButton: AppCompatButton? = null
128→    private var mCardsButton: AppCompatButton? = null
129→    private var mNoteTypeSpinner: Spinner? = null
130→    private var mDeckSpinnerSelection: DeckSpinnerSelection? = null
131→
132→    // non-null after onCollectionLoaded
133→    private var mEditorNote: Note? = null
134→
135→    /* Null if adding a new card. Presently NonNull if editing an existing note - but this is subject to change */
136→    private var mCurrentEditedCard: Card? = null
137→    private var mSelectedTags: ArrayList<String>? = null
138→
139→    @get:VisibleForTesting
140→    var deckId: DeckId = 0
141→        private set
142→    private var mAllModelIds: List<Long>? = null
143→
144→    @KotlinCleanup("this ideally should be Int, Int?")
145→    private var mModelChangeFieldMap: MutableMap<Int, Int>? = null
146→    private var mModelChangeCardMap: HashMap<Int, Int?>? = null
147→    private val mCustomViewIds = ArrayList<Int>()
148→
149→    /* indicates if a new note is added or a card is edited */
150→    private var addNote = false
151→    private var aedictIntent = false
152→
153→    /* indicates which activity called Note Editor */
154→    private var caller = 0
155→    private var mEditFields: LinkedList<FieldEditText?>? = null
156→    private var sourceText: Array<String?>? = null
157→    private val mFieldState = FieldState.fromEditor(this)
158→    private lateinit var toolbar: Toolbar

 100→/**
 101→ * Allows the user to edit a note, for instance if there is a typo. A card is a presentation of a note, and has two
 102→ * sides: a question and an answer. Any number of fields can appear on each side. When you add a note to Anki, cards
 103→ * which show that note are generated. Some models generate one card, others generate more than one.
 104→ *
 105→ * @see [the Anki Desktop manual](https://docs.ankiweb.net/getting-started.html.cards)
 106→ */
 107→@KotlinCleanup("Go through the class and select elements to fix")
 108→@KotlinCleanup("see if we can lateinit")
 109→class NoteEditor : AnkiActivity(), DeckSelectionListener, SubtitleListener, TagsDialogListener {
 110→    /** Whether any change are saved. E.g. multimedia, new card added, field changed and saved. */
 111→    private var changed = false
 112→    private var isTagsEdited = false
 113→    private var isFieldEdited = false
 114→
 115→    /**
 116→     * Flag which forces the calling activity to rebuild it's definition of current card from scratch
 117→     */
 118→    private var mReloadRequired = false
 119→
 120→    /**
 121→     * Broadcast that informs us when the sd card is about to be unmounted
 122→     */
 123→    private var mUnmountReceiver: BroadcastReceiver? = null
 124→    private var mFieldsLayoutContainer: LinearLayout? = null
 125→    private var mMediaRegistration: MediaRegistration? = null
 126→    private var mTagsDialogFactory: TagsDialogFactory? = null
 127→    private var mTagsButton: AppCompatButton? = null
 128→    private var mCardsButton: AppCompatButton? = null
 129→    private var mNoteTypeSpinner: Spinner? = null
 130→    private var mDeckSpinnerSelection: DeckSpinnerSelection? = null
 131→
 132→    // non-null after onCollectionLoaded
 133→    private var mEditorNote: Note? = null
 134→
 135→    /* Null if adding a new card. Presently NonNull if editing an existing note - but this is subject to change */
 136→    private var mCurrentEditedCard: Card? = null
 137→    private var mSelectedTags: ArrayList<String>? = null
 138→
 139→    @get:VisibleForTesting
 140→    var deckId: DeckId = 0
 141→        private set
 142→    private var mAllModelIds: List<Long>? = null
 143→
 144→    @KotlinCleanup("this ideally should be Int, Int?")
 145→    private var mModelChangeFieldMap: MutableMap<Int, Int>? = null
 146→    private var mModelChangeCardMap: HashMap<Int, Int?>? = null
 147→    private val mCustomViewIds = ArrayList<Int>()
 148→
 149→    /* indicates if a new note is added or a card is edited */
 150→    private var addNote = false
 151→    private var aedictIntent = false
 152→
 153→    /* indicates which activity called Note Editor */
 154→    private var caller = 0
 155→    private var mEditFields: LinkedList<FieldEditText?>? = null
 156→    private var sourceText: Array<String?>? = null
 157→    private val mFieldState = FieldState.fromEditor(this)
 158→    private lateinit var toolbar: Toolbar
 159→
 160→    // Use the same HTML if the same image is pasted multiple times.
 161→    private var mPastedImageCache: HashMap<String, String> = HashMap()
 162→
 163→    // save field index as key and text as value when toggle sticky clicked in Field Edit Text
 164→    private var mToggleStickyText: HashMap<Int, String?> = HashMap()
 165→    private val mOnboarding = Onboarding.NoteEditor(this)
 166→
 167→    override fun onDeckSelected(deck: SelectableDeck?) {
 168→        if (deck == null) {
 169→            return
 170→        }
 171→        deckId = deck.deckId
 172→        mDeckSpinnerSelection!!.initializeNoteEditorDeckSpinner()
 173→        mDeckSpinnerSelection!!.selectDeckById(deck.deckId, false)
 174→    }
 175→
 176→    override val subtitleText: String
 177→        get() = ""
 178→
 179→    private enum class AddClozeType {
 180→        SAME_NUMBER, INCREMENT_NUMBER
 181→    }
 182→
 183→    private fun displayErrorSavingNote() {
 184→        val errorMessageId = addNoteErrorResource
 185→        showSnackbar(resources.getString(errorMessageId))
 186→    }
 187→    // COULD_BE_BETTER: We currently don't perform edits inside this class (wat), so we only handle adds.
 188→
 189→    // Otherwise, display "no cards created".
 190→    @get:StringRes
 191→    @VisibleForTesting
 192→    internal val addNoteErrorResource: Int
 193→        get() {
 194→            // COULD_BE_BETTER: We currently don't perform edits inside this class (wat), so we only handle adds.
 195→            if (isClozeType) {
 196→                return R.string.note_editor_no_cloze_delations
 197→            }
 198→            if (getCurrentFieldText(0).isEmpty()) {
 199→                return R.string.note_editor_no_first_field
 200→            }
 201→            return if (allFieldsHaveContent()) {
 202→                R.string.note_editor_no_cards_created_all_fields
 203→            } else {
 204→                R.string.note_editor_no_cards_created
 205→            }
 206→
 207→            // Otherwise, display "no cards created".
 208→        }
 209→
 210→    private fun allFieldsHaveContent() = currentFieldStrings.none { it.isNullOrEmpty() }
 211→
 212→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
 213→    // ANDROID METHODS
 214→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
 215→    @Suppress("UNCHECKED_CAST", "deprecation") // deprecation: getSerializable
 216→    @KotlinCleanup("fix suppress")
 217→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 218→        if (showedActivityFailedScreen(savedInstanceState)) {
 219→            return
 220→        }
 221→        mTagsDialogFactory = TagsDialogFactory(this).attachToActivity<TagsDialogFactory>(this)
 222→        mMediaRegistration = MediaRegistration(this)
 223→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
 224→        mFieldState.setInstanceState(savedInstanceState)
 225→        setContentView(R.layout.note_editor)
 226→        val intent = intent
 227→        if (savedInstanceState != null) {
 228→            caller = savedInstanceState.getInt("caller")
 229→            addNote = savedInstanceState.getBoolean("addNote")
 230→            deckId = savedInstanceState.getLong("did")
 231→            mSelectedTags = savedInstanceState.getStringArrayList("tags")
 232→            mReloadRequired = savedInstanceState.getBoolean("reloadRequired")
 233→            mPastedImageCache =
 234→                savedInstanceState.getSerializable("imageCache") as HashMap<String, String>
 235→            mToggleStickyText =
 236→                savedInstanceState.getSerializable("toggleSticky") as HashMap<Int, String?>
 237→            changed = savedInstanceState.getBoolean("changed")
 238→        } else {
 239→            caller = intent.getIntExtra(EXTRA_CALLER, CALLER_NO_CALLER)
 240→            if (caller == CALLER_NO_CALLER) {
 241→                val action = intent.action
 242→                if (ACTION_CREATE_FLASHCARD == action || ACTION_CREATE_FLASHCARD_SEND == action || Compat.ACTION_PROCESS_TEXT == action) {
 243→                    caller = CALLER_NOTEEDITOR_INTENT_ADD
 244→                }
 245→            }
 246→        }
 247→        // Set up toolbar
 248→        toolbar = findViewById(R.id.editor_toolbar)
 249→        toolbar.apply {
 250→            formatListener = TextFormatListener { formatter: Toolbar.TextFormatter ->
 251→                val currentFocus = currentFocus as? FieldEditText ?: return@TextFormatListener
 252→                modifyCurrentSelection(formatter, currentFocus)
 253→            }
 254→            // Sets the background and icon color of toolbar respectively.
 255→            setBackgroundColor(
 256→                Themes.getColorFromAttr(
 257→                    this@NoteEditor,
 258→                    R.attr.toolbarBackgroundColor
 259→                )
 260→            )
 261→            setIconColor(Themes.getColorFromAttr(this@NoteEditor, R.attr.toolbarIconColor))
 262→        }
 263→        val mainView = findViewById<View>(android.R.id.content)
 264→        // Enable toolbar
 265→        enableToolbar(mainView)
 266→        startLoadingCollection()
 267→        mOnboarding.onCreate()
 268→    }
 269→
 270→    override fun onSaveInstanceState(savedInstanceState: Bundle) {
 271→        addInstanceStateToBundle(savedInstanceState)
 272→        super.onSaveInstanceState(savedInstanceState)
 273→    }
 274→
 275→    private fun addInstanceStateToBundle(savedInstanceState: Bundle) {
 276→        Timber.i("Saving instance")
 277→        savedInstanceState.putInt("caller", caller)
 278→        savedInstanceState.putBoolean("addNote", addNote)
 279→        savedInstanceState.putLong("did", deckId)
 280→        savedInstanceState.putBoolean("changed", changed)
 281→        savedInstanceState.putBoolean("reloadRequired", mReloadRequired)
 282→        savedInstanceState.putIntegerArrayList("customViewIds", mCustomViewIds)
 283→        savedInstanceState.putSerializable("imageCache", mPastedImageCache)
 284→        savedInstanceState.putSerializable("toggleSticky", mToggleStickyText)
 285→        if (mSelectedTags == null) {
 286→            mSelectedTags = ArrayList(0)
 287→        }
 288→        savedInstanceState.putStringArrayList("tags", mSelectedTags)
 289→    }
 290→
 291→    private val fieldsAsBundleForPreview: Bundle
 292→        get() = NoteService.getFieldsAsBundleForPreview(mEditFields, shouldReplaceNewlines())
 293→
 294→    // Finish initializing the activity after the collection has been correctly loaded
 295→    override fun onCollectionLoaded(col: Collection) {
 296→        super.onCollectionLoaded(col)
 297→        val intent = intent
 298→        Timber.d("NoteEditor() onCollectionLoaded: caller: %d", caller)
 299→        registerExternalStorageListener()
 300→        mFieldsLayoutContainer = findViewById(R.id.CardEditorEditFieldsLayout)
 301→        mTagsButton = findViewById(R.id.CardEditorTagButton)
 302→        mCardsButton = findViewById(R.id.CardEditorCardsButton)
 303→        mCardsButton!!.setOnClickListener {
 304→            Timber.i("NoteEditor:: Cards button pressed. Opening template editor")
 305→            showCardTemplateEditor()
 306→        }
 307→        aedictIntent = false
 308→        mCurrentEditedCard = null
 309→        when (caller) {
 310→            CALLER_NO_CALLER -> {
 311→                Timber.e("no caller could be identified, closing")
 312→                finishWithoutAnimation()
 313→                return
 314→            }
 315→            CALLER_REVIEWER_EDIT -> {
 316→                mCurrentEditedCard = AbstractFlashcardViewer.editorCard
 317→                if (mCurrentEditedCard == null) {
 318→                    finishWithoutAnimation()
 319→                    return
 320→                }
 321→                mEditorNote = mCurrentEditedCard!!.note()
 322→                addNote = false
 323→            }
 324→            CALLER_STUDYOPTIONS, CALLER_DECKPICKER, CALLER_REVIEWER_ADD, CALLER_CARDBROWSER_ADD, CALLER_NOTEEDITOR ->
 325→                addNote =
 326→                    true
 327→            CALLER_CARDBROWSER_EDIT -> {
 328→                mCurrentEditedCard = CardBrowser.cardBrowserCard
 329→                if (mCurrentEditedCard == null) {
 330→                    finishWithoutAnimation()
 331→                    return
 332→                }
 333→                mEditorNote = mCurrentEditedCard!!.note()
 334→                addNote = false
 335→            }
 336→            CALLER_NOTEEDITOR_INTENT_ADD -> {
 337→                fetchIntentInformation(intent)
 338→                if (sourceText == null) {
 339→                    finishWithoutAnimation()
 340→                    return
 341→                }
 342→                if ("Aedict Notepad" == sourceText!![0] && addFromAedict(sourceText!![1])) {
 343→                    finishWithoutAnimation()
 344→                    return
 345→                }
 346→                addNote = true
 347→            }
 348→            else -> {}
 349→        }
 350→
 351→        // Note type Selector
 352→        mNoteTypeSpinner = findViewById(R.id.note_type_spinner)
 353→        mAllModelIds = setupNoteTypeSpinner(this, mNoteTypeSpinner!!, col)
 354→
 355→        // Deck Selector
 356→        val deckTextView = findViewById<TextView>(R.id.CardEditorDeckText)
 357→        // If edit mode and more than one card template distinguish between "Deck" and "Card deck"
 358→        if (!addNote && mEditorNote!!.model().getJSONArray("tmpls").length() > 1) {
 359→            deckTextView.setText(R.string.CardEditorCardDeck)
 360→        }
 361→        mDeckSpinnerSelection =
 362→            DeckSpinnerSelection(
 363→                this,
 364→                col,
 365→                findViewById(R.id.note_deck_spinner),
 366→                showAllDecks = false,
 367→                alwaysShowDefault = true,
 368→                showFilteredDecks = false
 369→            )
 370→        mDeckSpinnerSelection!!.initializeNoteEditorDeckSpinner()
 371→        deckId = intent.getLongExtra(EXTRA_DID, deckId)
 372→        val getTextFromSearchView = intent.getStringExtra(EXTRA_TEXT_FROM_SEARCH_VIEW)
 373→        setDid(mEditorNote)
 374→        setNote(mEditorNote, FieldChangeType.onActivityCreation(shouldReplaceNewlines()))
 375→        if (addNote) {
 376→            mNoteTypeSpinner!!.onItemSelectedListener = SetNoteTypeListener()
 377→            setTitle(R.string.menu_add)
 378→            // set information transferred by intent
 379→            var contents: String? = null
 380→            val tags = intent.getStringArrayExtra(EXTRA_TAGS)
 381→            if (sourceText != null) {
 382→                if (aedictIntent && mEditFields!!.size == 3 && sourceText!![1]!!.contains("[")) {
 383→                    contents = sourceText!![1]!!
 384→                        .replaceFirst("\\[".toRegex(), "\u001f" + sourceText!![0] + "\u001f")
 385→                    contents = contents.substring(0, contents.length - 1)
 386→                } else if (!mEditFields!!.isEmpty()) {
 387→                    mEditFields!![0]!!.setText(sourceText!![0])
 388→                    if (mEditFields!!.size > 1) {
 389→                        mEditFields!![1]!!.setText(sourceText!![1])
 390→                    }
 391→                }
 392→            } else {
 393→                contents = intent.getStringExtra(EXTRA_CONTENTS)
 394→            }
 395→            contents?.let { setEditFieldTexts(it) }
 396→            tags?.let { setTags(it) }
 397→        } else {
 398→            mNoteTypeSpinner!!.onItemSelectedListener = EditNoteTypeListener()
 399→            setTitle(R.string.cardeditor_title_edit_card)
 400→        }
 401→        findViewById<View>(R.id.CardEditorTagButton).setOnClickListener {
 402→            Timber.i("NoteEditor:: Tags button pressed... opening tags editor")
 403→            showTagsDialog()
 404→        }
 405→        if (!addNote && mCurrentEditedCard != null) {
 406→            Timber.i(
 407→                "onCollectionLoaded() Edit note activity successfully started with card id %d",
 408→                mCurrentEditedCard!!.id
 409→            )
 410→        }
 411→        if (addNote) {
 412→            Timber.i(
 413→                "onCollectionLoaded() Edit note activity successfully started in add card mode with node id %d",
 414→                mEditorNote!!.id
 415→            )
 416→        }
 417→
 418→        // don't open keyboard if not adding note
 419→        if (!addNote) {
 420→            this.window.setSoftInputMode(WindowManager.LayoutParams.SOFT_INPUT_STATE_ALWAYS_HIDDEN)
 421→        }
 422→
 423→        // set focus to FieldEditText 'first' on startup like Anki desktop
 424→        if (mEditFields != null && !mEditFields!!.isEmpty()) {
 425→            // EXTRA_TEXT_FROM_SEARCH_VIEW takes priority over other intent inputs
 426→            if (getTextFromSearchView != null && getTextFromSearchView.isNotEmpty()) {
 427→                mEditFields!!.first!!.setText(getTextFromSearchView)
 428→            }
 429→            mEditFields!!.first!!.requestFocus()
 430→        }
 431→    }
 432→
 433→    private fun modifyCurrentSelection(formatter: Toolbar.TextFormatter, textBox: FieldEditText) {
 434→        // get the current text and selection locations
 435→        val selectionStart = textBox.selectionStart
 436→        val selectionEnd = textBox.selectionEnd
 437→
 438→        // #6762 values are reversed if using a keyboard and pressing Ctrl+Shift+LeftArrow
 439→        val start = min(selectionStart, selectionEnd)
 440→        val end = max(selectionStart, selectionEnd)
 441→        val text = textBox.text?.toString() ?: ""
 442→
 443→        // Split the text in the places where the formatting will take place
 444→        val beforeText = text.substring(0, start)
 445→        val selectedText = text.substring(start, end)
 446→        val afterText = text.substring(end)
 447→        val (newText, newStart, newEnd) = formatter.format(selectedText)
 448→
 449→        // Update text field with updated text and selection
 450→        val length = beforeText.length + newText.length + afterText.length
 451→        val newFieldContent =
 452→            StringBuilder(length).append(beforeText).append(newText).append(afterText)
 453→        textBox.setText(newFieldContent)
 454→        textBox.setSelection(start + newStart, start + newEnd)
 455→    }
 456→
 457→    override fun onStop() {
 458→        super.onStop()
 459→        if (!isFinishing) {
 460→            WidgetStatus.updateInBackground(this)
 461→        }
 462→    }
 463→
 464→    @KotlinCleanup("convert KeyUtils to extension functions")
 465→    override fun onKeyUp(keyCode: Int, event: KeyEvent): Boolean {
 466→        if (toolbar.onKeyUp(keyCode, event)) {
 467→            return true
 468→        }
 469→        when (keyCode) {
 470→            KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_ENTER, KeyEvent.KEYCODE_ENTER -> if (event.isCtrlPressed) {
 471→                launchCatchingTask { saveNote() }
 472→            }
 473→            KeyEvent.KEYCODE_D -> // null check in case Spinner is moved into options menu in the future
 474→                if (event.isCtrlPressed) {
 475→                    mDeckSpinnerSelection!!.displayDeckSelectionDialog(getColUnsafe)
 476→                }
 477→            KeyEvent.KEYCODE_L -> if (event.isCtrlPressed) {
 478→                showCardTemplateEditor()
 479→            }
 480→            KeyEvent.KEYCODE_N -> if (event.isCtrlPressed && mNoteTypeSpinner != null) {
 481→                mNoteTypeSpinner!!.performClick()
 482→            }
 483→            KeyEvent.KEYCODE_T -> if (event.isCtrlPressed && event.isShiftPressed) {
 484→                showTagsDialog()
 485→            }
 486→            KeyEvent.KEYCODE_C -> {
 487→                if (event.isCtrlPressed && event.isShiftPressed) {
 488→                    insertCloze(if (event.isAltPressed) AddClozeType.SAME_NUMBER else AddClozeType.INCREMENT_NUMBER)
 489→                    // Anki Desktop warns, but still inserts the cloze
 490→                    if (!isClozeType) {
 491→                        showSnackbar(R.string.note_editor_insert_cloze_no_cloze_note_type)
 492→                    }
 493→                }
 494→            }
 495→            KeyEvent.KEYCODE_P -> {
 496→                if (event.isCtrlPressed) {
 497→                    Timber.i("Ctrl+P: Preview Pressed")
 498→                    performPreview()
 499→                }
 500→            }
 501→            else -> {}
 502→        }
 503→
 504→        // 7573: Ctrl+Shift+[Num] to select a field
 505→        if (event.isCtrlPressed && event.isShiftPressed && KeyUtils.isDigit(event)) {
 506→            val digit = KeyUtils.getDigit(event)
 507→            // map: '0' -> 9; '1' to 0
 508→            val indexBase10 = ((digit - 1) % 10 + 10) % 10
 509→            selectFieldIndex(indexBase10)
 510→        }
 511→        return super.onKeyUp(keyCode, event)
 512→    }
 513→
 514→    private fun selectFieldIndex(index: Int) {
 515→        Timber.i("Selecting field index %d", index)
 516→        if (mEditFields!!.size <= index || index < 0) {
 517→            Timber.i("Index out of range: %d", index)
 518→            return
 519→        }
 520→        val field: FieldEditText? = try {
 521→            mEditFields!![index]
 522→        } catch (e: IndexOutOfBoundsException) {
 523→            Timber.w(e, "Error selecting index %d", index)
 524→            return
 525→        }
 526→        field!!.requestFocus()
 527→        Timber.d("Selected field")
 528→    }

 535→    private fun fetchIntentInformation(intent: Intent) {
 536→        val extras = intent.extras ?: return
 537→        sourceText = arrayOfNulls(2)
 538→        if (Compat.ACTION_PROCESS_TEXT == intent.action) {
 539→            val stringExtra = intent.getStringExtra(Compat.EXTRA_PROCESS_TEXT)
 540→            Timber.d("Obtained %s from intent: %s", stringExtra, Compat.EXTRA_PROCESS_TEXT)
 541→            sourceText!![0] = stringExtra ?: ""
 542→            sourceText!![1] = ""
 543→        } else if (ACTION_CREATE_FLASHCARD == intent.action) {
 544→            // mSourceLanguage = extras.getString(SOURCE_LANGUAGE);
 545→            // mTargetLanguage = extras.getString(TARGET_LANGUAGE);
 546→            sourceText!![0] = extras.getString(SOURCE_TEXT)
 547→            sourceText!![1] = extras.getString(TARGET_TEXT)
 548→        } else {
 549→            var first: String?
 550→            var second: String?
 551→            first = if (extras.getString(Intent.EXTRA_SUBJECT) != null) {
 552→                extras.getString(Intent.EXTRA_SUBJECT)
 553→            } else {
 554→                ""
 555→            }
 556→            second = if (extras.getString(Intent.EXTRA_TEXT) != null) {
 557→                extras.getString(Intent.EXTRA_TEXT)
 558→            } else {
 559→                ""
 560→            }
 561→            // Some users add cards via SEND intent from clipboard. In this case SUBJECT is empty
 562→            if ("" == first) {
 563→                // Assume that if only one field was sent then it should be the front
 564→                first = second
 565→                second = ""
 566→            }
 567→            val messages = Pair(first, second)
 568→            sourceText!![0] = messages.first
 569→            sourceText!![1] = messages.second
 570→        }
 571→    }
 572→
 573→    private fun addFromAedict(extra_text: String?): Boolean {
 574→        var category: String
 575→        val notepadLines = extra_text!!.split("\n".toRegex()).toTypedArray()
 576→        for (i in notepadLines.indices) {
 577→            if (notepadLines[i].startsWith("[") && notepadLines[i].endsWith("]")) {
 578→                category = notepadLines[i].substring(1, notepadLines[i].length - 1)
 579→                if ("default" == category) {
 580→                    if (notepadLines.size > i + 1) {
 581→                        val entryLines = notepadLines[i + 1].split(":".toRegex()).toTypedArray()
 582→                        if (entryLines.size > 1) {
 583→                            sourceText!![0] = entryLines[1]
 584→                            sourceText!![1] = entryLines[0]
 585→                            aedictIntent = true
 586→                            return false
 587→                        }
 588→                    }
 589→                    showSnackbar(resources.getString(R.string.intent_aedict_empty))
 590→                    return true
 591→                }
 592→            }
 593→        }
 594→        showSnackbar(resources.getString(R.string.intent_aedict_category))
 595→        return true
 596→    }

 598→    private fun hasUnsavedChanges(): Boolean {
 599→        if (!collectionHasLoaded()) {
 600→            return false
 601→        }
 602→
 603→        // changed note type?
 604→        if (!addNote && mCurrentEditedCard != null) {
 605→            val newModel: JSONObject? = currentlySelectedNotetype
 606→            val oldModel: JSONObject = mCurrentEditedCard!!.model()
 607→            if (newModel != oldModel) {
 608→                return true
 609→            }
 610→        }
 611→        // changed deck?
 612→        if (!addNote && mCurrentEditedCard != null && mCurrentEditedCard!!.did != deckId) {
 613→            return true
 614→        }
 615→        // changed fields?
 616→        return if (isFieldEdited) {
 617→            true
 618→        } else {
 619→            isTagsEdited
 620→        }
 621→        // changed tags?
 622→    }

 625→        return mAllModelIds != null

 632→    /**
 633→     * @param noOfAddedCards
 634→     */
 635→    @KotlinCleanup("return early and simplify if possible")
 636→    private fun onNoteAdded() {
 637→        var closeEditorAfterSave = false
 638→        var closeIntent: Intent? = null
 639→        changed = true
 640→        sourceText = null
 641→        refreshNoteData(FieldChangeType.refreshWithStickyFields(shouldReplaceNewlines()))
 642→        showSnackbar(TR.addingAdded(), Snackbar.LENGTH_SHORT)
 643→
 644→        if (caller == CALLER_NOTEEDITOR || aedictIntent) {
 645→            closeEditorAfterSave = true
 646→        } else if (caller == CALLER_NOTEEDITOR_INTENT_ADD) {
 647→            closeEditorAfterSave = true
 648→            closeIntent = Intent().apply { putExtra(EXTRA_ID, intent.getStringExtra(EXTRA_ID)) }
 649→        } else if (!mEditFields!!.isEmpty()) {
 650→            mEditFields!!.first!!.focusWithKeyboard()
 651→        }
 652→
 653→        if (closeEditorAfterSave) {
 654→            closeNoteEditor(closeIntent ?: Intent())
 655→        } else {
 656→            // Reset check for changes to fields
 657→            isFieldEdited = false
 658→            isTagsEdited = false
 659→        }
 660→    }

 662→    @VisibleForTesting
 663→    suspend fun saveNote() {
 664→        val res = resources
 665→        if (mSelectedTags == null) {
 666→            mSelectedTags = ArrayList(0)
 667→        }
 668→        saveToggleStickyMap()
 669→
 670→        // treat add new note and edit existing note independently
 671→        if (addNote) {
 672→            // Different from libAnki, block if there are no cloze deletions.
 673→            // DEFECT: This does not block addition if cloze transpositions are in non-cloze fields.
 674→            if (isClozeType && !hasClozeDeletions()) {
 675→                displayErrorSavingNote()
 676→                return
 677→            }
 678→            if (getCurrentFieldText(0).isEmpty()) {
 679→                displayErrorSavingNote()
 680→                return
 681→            }
 682→
 683→            // load all of the fields into the note
 684→            for (f in mEditFields!!) {
 685→                updateField(f)
 686→            }
 687→            // Save deck to model
 688→            mEditorNote!!.model().put("did", deckId)
 689→            // Save tags to model
 690→            mEditorNote!!.setTagsFromStr(tagsAsString(mSelectedTags!!))
 691→            val tags = JSONArray()
 692→            for (t in mSelectedTags!!) {
 693→                tags.put(t)
 694→            }
 695→
 696→            mReloadRequired = true
 697→            // adding current note to collection
 698→            withProgress(resources.getString(R.string.saving_facts)) {
 699→                undoableOp {
 700→                    notetypes.current().put("tags", tags)
 701→                    addNote(mEditorNote!!, deckId)
 702→                }
 703→            }
 704→            // update UI based on the result, noOfAddedCards
 705→            onNoteAdded()
 706→            updateFieldsFromStickyText()
 707→        } else {
 708→            // Check whether note type has been changed
 709→            val newModel = currentlySelectedNotetype
 710→            val oldModel = if (mCurrentEditedCard == null) null else mCurrentEditedCard!!.model()
 711→            if (newModel != oldModel) {
 712→                mReloadRequired = true
 713→                if (mModelChangeCardMap!!.size < mEditorNote!!.numberOfCards() || mModelChangeCardMap!!.containsValue(
 714→                        null
 715→                    )
 716→                ) {
 717→                    // If cards will be lost via the new mapping then show a confirmation dialog before proceeding with the change
 718→                    val dialog = ConfirmationDialog()
 719→                    dialog.setArgs(res.getString(R.string.confirm_map_cards_to_nothing))
 720→                    val confirm = Runnable {
 721→                        // Bypass the check once the user confirms
 722→                        changeNoteTypeWithErrorHandling(oldModel, newModel)
 723→                    }
 724→                    dialog.setConfirm(confirm)
 725→                    showDialogFragment(dialog)
 726→                } else {
 727→                    // Otherwise go straight to changing note type
 728→                    changeNoteTypeWithErrorHandling(oldModel, newModel)
 729→                }
 730→                return
 731→            }
 732→            // Regular changes in note content
 733→            var modified = false
 734→            // changed did? this has to be done first as remFromDyn() involves a direct write to the database
 735→            if (mCurrentEditedCard != null && mCurrentEditedCard!!.did != deckId) {
 736→                mReloadRequired = true
 737→                getColUnsafe.setDeck(listOf(mCurrentEditedCard!!.id), deckId)
 738→                // refresh the card object to reflect the database changes from above
 739→                mCurrentEditedCard!!.load()
 740→                // also reload the note object
 741→                mEditorNote = mCurrentEditedCard!!.note()
 742→                // then set the card ID to the new deck
 743→                mCurrentEditedCard!!.did = deckId
 744→                modified = true
 745→            }
 746→            // Check if the front of the card is not empty
 747→            if (getCurrentFieldText(0).isEmpty()) {
 748→                displayErrorSavingNote()
 749→                return
 750→            }
 751→            // now load any changes to the fields from the form
 752→            for (f in mEditFields!!) {
 753→                modified = modified or updateField(f)
 754→            }
 755→            // added tag?
 756→            for (t in mSelectedTags!!) {
 757→                modified = modified || !mEditorNote!!.hasTag(t)
 758→            }
 759→            // removed tag?
 760→            modified = modified || mEditorNote!!.tags.size > mSelectedTags!!.size
 761→            if (modified) {
 762→                mEditorNote!!.setTagsFromStr(tagsAsString(mSelectedTags!!))
 763→                changed = true
 764→            }
 765→            closeNoteEditor()
 766→        }
 767→    }

 769→    /**
 770→     * Change the note type from oldModel to newModel, handling the case where a full sync will be required
 771→     */
 772→    private fun changeNoteTypeWithErrorHandling(oldNotetype: NotetypeJson?, newNotetype: NotetypeJson?) {
 773→        val res = resources
 774→        try {
 775→            changeNoteType(oldNotetype, newNotetype)
 776→        } catch (e: ConfirmModSchemaException) {
 777→            e.log()
 778→            // Libanki has determined we should ask the user to confirm first
 779→            val dialog = ConfirmationDialog()
 780→            dialog.setArgs(res.getString(R.string.full_sync_confirmation))
 781→            val confirm = Runnable {
 782→                // Bypass the check once the user confirms
 783→                getColUnsafe.modSchemaNoCheck()
 784→                try {
 785→                    changeNoteType(oldNotetype, newNotetype)
 786→                } catch (e2: ConfirmModSchemaException) {
 787→                    // This should never be reached as we explicitly called modSchemaNoCheck()
 788→                    throw RuntimeException(e2)
 789→                }
 790→            }
 791→            dialog.setConfirm(confirm)
 792→            showDialogFragment(dialog)
 793→        }
 794→    }
 795→
 796→    /**
 797→     * Change the note type from oldModel to newModel
 798→     * @throws ConfirmModSchemaException If a full sync will be required
 799→     */
 800→    @Throws(ConfirmModSchemaException::class)
 801→    private fun changeNoteType(oldNotetype: NotetypeJson?, newNotetype: NotetypeJson?) {
 802→        val noteId = mEditorNote!!.id
 803→        getColUnsafe.notetypes.change(oldNotetype!!, noteId, newNotetype!!, mModelChangeFieldMap!!, mModelChangeCardMap!!)
 804→        // refresh the note object to reflect the database changes
 805→        mEditorNote!!.load()
 806→        // close note editor
 807→        closeNoteEditor()
 808→    }

 827→    override fun onCreateOptionsMenu(menu: Menu): Boolean {
 828→        menuInflater.inflate(R.menu.note_editor, menu)
 829→        if (addNote) {
 830→            menu.findItem(R.id.action_copy_note).isVisible = false
 831→        } else {
 832→            menu.findItem(R.id.action_add_note_from_note_editor).isVisible = true
 833→        }
 834→        if (mEditFields != null) {
 835→            for (i in mEditFields!!.indices) {
 836→                val fieldText = mEditFields!![i]!!.text
 837→                if (fieldText != null && fieldText.isNotEmpty()) {
 838→                    menu.findItem(R.id.action_copy_note).isEnabled = true
 839→                    break
 840→                } else if (i == mEditFields!!.size - 1) {
 841→                    menu.findItem(R.id.action_copy_note).isEnabled = false
 842→                }
 843→            }
 844→        }
 845→        menu.findItem(R.id.action_show_toolbar).isChecked =
 846→            !shouldHideToolbar()
 847→        menu.findItem(R.id.action_capitalize).isChecked =
 848→            this.sharedPrefs().getBoolean(PREF_NOTE_EDITOR_CAPITALIZE, true)
 849→        menu.findItem(R.id.action_scroll_toolbar).isChecked =
 850→            this.sharedPrefs().getBoolean(PREF_NOTE_EDITOR_SCROLL_TOOLBAR, true)
 851→        return super.onCreateOptionsMenu(menu)
 852→    }

 854→    override fun onOptionsItemSelected(item: MenuItem): Boolean {
 855→        when (item.itemId) {
 856→            android.R.id.home -> {
 857→                Timber.i("NoteEditor:: Home button pressed")
 858→                closeCardEditorWithCheck()
 859→                return true
 860→            }
 861→            R.id.action_preview -> {
 862→                Timber.i("NoteEditor:: Preview button pressed")
 863→                performPreview()
 864→                return true
 865→            }
 866→            R.id.action_save -> {
 867→                Timber.i("NoteEditor:: Save note button pressed")
 868→                launchCatchingTask { saveNote() }
 869→                return true
 870→            }
 871→            R.id.action_add_note_from_note_editor -> {
 872→                Timber.i("NoteEditor:: Add Note button pressed")
 873→                addNewNote()
 874→                return true
 875→            }
 876→            R.id.action_copy_note -> {
 877→                Timber.i("NoteEditor:: Copy Note button pressed")
 878→                copyNote()
 879→                return true
 880→            }
 881→            R.id.action_font_size -> {
 882→                Timber.i("NoteEditor:: Font Size button pressed")
 883→                val repositionDialog = IntegerDialog()
 884→                repositionDialog.setArgs(getString(R.string.menu_font_size), editTextFontSize, 2)
 885→                repositionDialog.setCallbackRunnable { fontSizeSp: Int? -> setFontSize(fontSizeSp) }
 886→                showDialogFragment(repositionDialog)
 887→                return true
 888→            }
 889→            R.id.action_show_toolbar -> {
 890→                item.isChecked = !item.isChecked
 891→                this.sharedPrefs().edit {
 892→                    putBoolean(PREF_NOTE_EDITOR_SHOW_TOOLBAR, item.isChecked)
 893→                }
 894→                updateToolbar()
 895→            }
 896→            R.id.action_capitalize -> {
 897→                Timber.i("NoteEditor:: Capitalize button pressed. New State: %b", !item.isChecked)
 898→                item.isChecked = !item.isChecked // Needed for Android 9
 899→                toggleCapitalize(item.isChecked)
 900→                return true
 901→            }
 902→            R.id.action_scroll_toolbar -> {
 903→                item.isChecked = !item.isChecked
 904→                this.sharedPrefs().edit {
 905→                    putBoolean(PREF_NOTE_EDITOR_SCROLL_TOOLBAR, item.isChecked)
 906→                }
 907→                updateToolbar()
 908→            }
 909→        }
 910→        return super.onOptionsItemSelected(item)
 911→    }

1000→                    if (intent.action != null && intent.action == SdCardReceiver.MEDIA_EJECT) {

1002→                    }
1003→                }

1031→    private fun closeNoteEditor(intent: Intent = Intent()) {
1032→        val result: Int = if (changed) {
1033→            RESULT_OK
1034→        } else {
1035→            RESULT_CANCELED
1036→        }
1037→        if (mReloadRequired) {
1038→            intent.putExtra("reloadRequired", true)
1039→        }
1040→        if (changed) {
1041→            intent.putExtra("noteChanged", true)
1042→        }
1043→        closeNoteEditor(result, intent)
1044→    }

1046→    private fun closeNoteEditor(result: Int, intent: Intent?) {
1047→        if (intent != null) {
1048→            setResult(result, intent)
1049→        } else {
1050→            setResult(result)
1051→        }
1052→        // ensure there are no orphans from possible edit previews
1053→        CardTemplateNotetype.clearTempModelFiles()
1054→
1055→        // Set the finish animation if there is one on the intent which created the activity
1056→        val animation = IntentCompat.getParcelableExtra(
1057→            this.intent,
1058→            FINISH_ANIMATION_EXTRA,
1059→            ActivityTransitionAnimation.Direction::class.java
1060→        )
1061→        if (animation != null) {
1062→            finishWithAnimation(animation)
1063→            return
1064→        }
1065→
1066→        if (caller == CALLER_NOTEEDITOR_INTENT_ADD) {
1067→            finishWithAnimation(NONE)
1068→        } else {
1069→            finishWithAnimation(END)
1070→        }
1071→    }

1118→    @Suppress("deprecation") // onActivityResult
1119→    @Deprecated("Use Activity Result API")
1120→    override fun onActivityResult(requestCode: Int, resultCode: Int, data: Intent?) {
1121→        Timber.d("onActivityResult() with request/result: %s/%s", requestCode, resultCode)
1122→        super.onActivityResult(requestCode, resultCode, data)
1123→        if (resultCode == DeckPicker.RESULT_DB_ERROR) {
1124→            closeNoteEditor(DeckPicker.RESULT_DB_ERROR, null)
1125→        }
1126→        when (requestCode) {
1127→            REQUEST_ADD -> {
1128→                if (resultCode != RESULT_CANCELED) {
1129→                    changed = true
1130→                }
1131→            }
1132→            @NeedsTest("test to guard against changes in the REQUEST_MULTIMEDIA_EDIT clause preventing text fields to be updated")
1133→            REQUEST_MULTIMEDIA_EDIT -> {
1134→                if (resultCode != RESULT_CANCELED) {
1135→                    val col = getColUnsafe
1136→                    val extras = data!!.extras ?: return
1137→                    val index = extras.getInt(MultimediaEditFieldActivity.EXTRA_RESULT_FIELD_INDEX)
1138→                    val field = extras[MultimediaEditFieldActivity.EXTRA_RESULT_FIELD] as IField? ?: return
1139→                    if (field.type != EFieldType.TEXT && (field.imagePath == null && field.audioPath == null)) {
1140→                        Timber.i("field imagePath and audioPath are both null")
1141→                        return
1142→                    }
1143→                    val note = getCurrentMultimediaEditableNote(col)
1144→                    note.setField(index, field)
1145→                    val fieldEditText = mEditFields!![index]
1146→                    // Import field media
1147→                    // This goes before setting formattedValue to update
1148→                    // media paths with the checksum when they have the same name
1149→                    NoteService.importMediaToDirectory(col, field)
1150→                    // Completely replace text for text fields (because current text was passed in)
1151→                    val formattedValue = field.formattedValue
1152→                    if (field.type === EFieldType.TEXT) {
1153→                        fieldEditText!!.setText(formattedValue)
1154→                    } else if (fieldEditText!!.text != null) {
1155→                        insertStringInField(fieldEditText, formattedValue)
1156→                    }
1157→                    changed = true
1158→                }
1159→            }
1160→            REQUEST_TEMPLATE_EDIT -> {
1161→                // Model can change regardless of exit type - update ourselves and CardBrowser
1162→                mReloadRequired = true
1163→                mEditorNote!!.reloadModel()
1164→                if (mCurrentEditedCard == null || !mEditorNote!!.cids()
1165→                    .contains(mCurrentEditedCard!!.id)
1166→                ) {
1167→                    if (!addNote) {
1168→                        /* This can occur, for example, if the
1169→                             * card type was deleted or if the note
1170→                             * type was changed without moving this
1171→                             * card to another type. */
1172→                        Timber.d("onActivityResult() template edit return - current card is gone, close note editor")
1173→                        showSnackbar(getString(R.string.template_for_current_card_deleted))
1174→                        closeNoteEditor()
1175→                    } else {
1176→                        Timber.d("onActivityResult() template edit return, in add mode, just re-display")
1177→                    }
1178→                } else {
1179→                    Timber.d("onActivityResult() template edit return - current card exists")
1180→                    // reload current card - the template ordinals are possibly different post-edit
1181→                    mCurrentEditedCard = getColUnsafe.getCard(mCurrentEditedCard!!.id)
1182→                    updateCards(mEditorNote!!.model())
1183→                }
1184→            }
1185→        }
1186→    }

1188→    /** Appends a string at the selection point, or appends to the end if not in focus  */
1189→    @VisibleForTesting
1190→    fun insertStringInField(fieldEditText: EditText?, formattedValue: String?) {
1191→        if (fieldEditText!!.hasFocus()) {
1192→            // Crashes if start > end, although this is fine for a selection via keyboard.
1193→            val start = fieldEditText.selectionStart
1194→            val end = fieldEditText.selectionEnd
1195→            fieldEditText.text.replace(min(start, end), max(start, end), formattedValue)
1196→        } else {
1197→            fieldEditText.text.append(formattedValue)
1198→        }
1199→    }

1234→    private fun populateEditFields(type: FieldChangeType, editModelMode: Boolean) {
1235→        val editLines = mFieldState.loadFieldEditLines(type)
1236→        mFieldsLayoutContainer!!.removeAllViews()
1237→        mCustomViewIds.clear()
1238→        mEditFields = LinkedList()
1239→
1240→        // Use custom font if selected from preferences
1241→        var customTypeface: Typeface? = null
1242→        val preferences = baseContext.sharedPrefs()
1243→        val customFont = preferences.getString("browserEditorFont", "")
1244→        if ("" != customFont) {
1245→            customTypeface = AnkiFont.getTypeface(this, customFont!!)
1246→        }
1247→        var previous: FieldEditLine? = null
1248→        mCustomViewIds.ensureCapacity(editLines.size)
1249→        for (i in editLines.indices) {
1250→            val editLineView = editLines[i]
1251→            mCustomViewIds.add(editLineView.id)
1252→            val newEditText = editLineView.editText
1253→            newEditText.setImagePasteListener { editText: EditText?, uri: Uri? ->
1254→                onImagePaste(
1255→                    editText!!,
1256→                    uri!!
1257→                )
1258→            }
1259→            if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT < Build.VERSION_CODES.O) {
1260→                if (i == 0) {
1261→                    findViewById<View>(R.id.note_deck_spinner).nextFocusForwardId = newEditText.id
1262→                }
1263→                if (previous != null) {
1264→                    previous.lastViewInTabOrder.nextFocusForwardId = newEditText.id
1265→                }
1266→            }
1267→            previous = editLineView
1268→            editLineView.setEnableAnimation(animationEnabled())
1269→
1270→            // Use custom implementation of ActionMode.Callback customize selection and insert menus
1271→            editLineView.setActionModeCallbacks(ActionModeCallback(newEditText))
1272→            editLineView.setTypeface(customTypeface)
1273→            editLineView.setHintLocale(getHintLocaleForField(editLineView.name))
1274→            initFieldEditText(newEditText, i, !editModelMode)
1275→            mEditFields!!.add(newEditText)
1276→            val prefs = this.sharedPrefs()
1277→            if (prefs.getInt(PREF_NOTE_EDITOR_FONT_SIZE, -1) > 0) {
1278→                newEditText.textSize = prefs.getInt(PREF_NOTE_EDITOR_FONT_SIZE, -1).toFloat()
1279→            }
1280→            newEditText.setCapitalize(prefs.getBoolean(PREF_NOTE_EDITOR_CAPITALIZE, true))
1281→            val mediaButton = editLineView.mediaButton
1282→            val toggleStickyButton = editLineView.toggleSticky
1283→            // Load icons from attributes
1284→            val icons = Themes.getResFromAttr(
1285→                this,
1286→                intArrayOf(R.attr.attachFileImage, R.attr.upDownImage, R.attr.toggleStickyImage)
1287→            )
1288→            // Make the icon change between media icon and switch field icon depending on whether editing note type
1289→            if (editModelMode && allowFieldRemapping()) {
1290→                // Allow remapping if originally more than two fields
1291→                mediaButton.setBackgroundResource(icons[1])
1292→                setRemapButtonListener(mediaButton, i)
1293→                toggleStickyButton.setBackgroundResource(0)
1294→            } else if (editModelMode && !allowFieldRemapping()) {
1295→                mediaButton.setBackgroundResource(0)
1296→                toggleStickyButton.setBackgroundResource(0)
1297→            } else {
1298→                // Use media editor button if not changing note type
1299→                mediaButton.setBackgroundResource(icons[0])
1300→                setMMButtonListener(mediaButton, i)
1301→                if (addNote) {
1302→                    // toggle sticky button
1303→                    toggleStickyButton.setBackgroundResource(icons[2])
1304→                    setToggleStickyButtonListener(toggleStickyButton, i)
1305→                } else {
1306→                    toggleStickyButton.setBackgroundResource(0)
1307→                }
1308→            }
1309→            if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT < Build.VERSION_CODES.O) {
1310→                previous.lastViewInTabOrder.nextFocusForwardId = R.id.CardEditorTagButton
1311→            }
1312→            mediaButton.contentDescription =
1313→                getString(R.string.multimedia_editor_attach_mm_content, editLineView.name)
1314→            toggleStickyButton.contentDescription =
1315→                getString(R.string.note_editor_toggle_sticky, editLineView.name)
1316→            mFieldsLayoutContainer!!.addView(editLineView)
1317→        }
1318→    }

1347→                popup.setOnMenuItemClickListener { item: MenuItem ->

1444→    private fun setRemapButtonListener(remapButton: ImageButton?, newFieldIndex: Int) {
1445→        remapButton!!.setOnClickListener { v: View? ->
1446→            Timber.i("NoteEditor:: Remap button pressed for new field %d", newFieldIndex)
1447→            // Show list of fields from the original note which we can map to
1448→            val popup = PopupMenu(this@NoteEditor, v!!)
1449→            val items = mEditorNote!!.items()
1450→            for (i in items.indices) {
1451→                popup.menu.add(Menu.NONE, i, Menu.NONE, items[i][0])
1452→            }
1453→            // Add "nothing" at the end of the list
1454→            popup.menu.add(Menu.NONE, items.size, Menu.NONE, R.string.nothing)
1455→            popup.setOnMenuItemClickListener { item: MenuItem ->
1456→                // Get menu item id
1457→                val idx = item.itemId
1458→                Timber.i("NoteEditor:: User chose to remap to old field %d", idx)
1459→                // Retrieve any existing mappings between newFieldIndex and idx
1460→                val previousMapping = MapUtil.getKeyByValue(mModelChangeFieldMap!!, newFieldIndex)
1461→                val mappingConflict = mModelChangeFieldMap!![idx]
1462→                // Update the mapping depending on any conflicts
1463→                if (idx == items.size && previousMapping != null) {
1464→                    // Remove the previous mapping if None selected
1465→                    mModelChangeFieldMap!!.remove(previousMapping)
1466→                } else if (idx < items.size && mappingConflict != null && previousMapping != null && newFieldIndex != mappingConflict) {
1467→                    // Swap the two mappings if there was a conflict and previous mapping
1468→                    mModelChangeFieldMap!![previousMapping] = mappingConflict
1469→                    mModelChangeFieldMap!![idx] = newFieldIndex
1470→                } else if (idx < items.size && mappingConflict != null) {
1471→                    // Set the conflicting field to None if no previous mapping to swap into it
1472→                    mModelChangeFieldMap!!.remove(previousMapping)
1473→                    mModelChangeFieldMap!![idx] = newFieldIndex
1474→                } else if (idx < items.size) {
1475→                    // Can simply set the new mapping if no conflicts
1476→                    mModelChangeFieldMap!![idx] = newFieldIndex
1477→                }
1478→                // Reload the fields
1479→                updateFieldsFromMap(currentlySelectedNotetype)
1480→                true
1481→            }
1482→            popup.show()
1483→        }
1484→    }

1493→    private fun initFieldEditText(editText: FieldEditText?, index: Int, enabled: Boolean) {
1494→        // Listen for changes in the first field so we can re-check duplicate status.
1495→        editText!!.addTextChangedListener(EditFieldTextWatcher(index))
1496→        if (index == 0) {
1497→            editText.onFocusChangeListener = OnFocusChangeListener { _: View?, hasFocus: Boolean ->
1498→                try {
1499→                    if (hasFocus) {
1500→                        // we only want to decorate when we lose focus
1501→                        return@OnFocusChangeListener
1502→                    }
1503→                    val currentFieldStrings = currentFieldStrings
1504→                    if (currentFieldStrings.size != 2 || currentFieldStrings[1]!!.isNotEmpty()) {
1505→                        // we only decorate on 2-field cards while second field is still empty
1506→                        return@OnFocusChangeListener
1507→                    }
1508→                    val firstField = currentFieldStrings[0]
1509→                    val decoratedText = NoteFieldDecorator.aplicaHuevo(firstField)
1510→                    if (decoratedText != firstField) {
1511→                        // we only apply the decoration if it is actually different from the first field
1512→                        setFieldValueFromUi(1, decoratedText)
1513→                    }
1514→                } catch (e: Exception) {
1515→                    Timber.w(e, "Unable to decorate text field")
1516→                }
1517→            }
1518→        }
1519→
1520→        // Sets the background color of disabled EditText.
1521→        if (!enabled) {
1522→            editText.setBackgroundColor(
1523→                Themes.getColorFromAttr(
1524→                    this@NoteEditor,
1525→                    R.attr.editTextBackgroundColor
1526→                )
1527→            )
1528→        }
1529→        editText.isEnabled = enabled
1530→    }

1566→    private fun setDuplicateFieldStyles() {
1567→        val field = mEditFields!![0]
1568→        // Keep copy of current internal value for this field.
1569→        val oldValue = mEditorNote!!.fields[0]
1570→        // Update the field in the Note so we can run a dupe check on it.
1571→        updateField(field)
1572→        // 1 is empty, 2 is dupe, null is neither.
1573→        val dupeCode = mEditorNote!!.dupeOrEmpty()
1574→        // Change bottom line color of text field
1575→        if (dupeCode == DupeOrEmpty.DUPE) {
1576→            field!!.setDupeStyle()
1577→        } else {
1578→            field!!.setDefaultStyle()
1579→        }
1580→        // Put back the old value so we don't interfere with modification detection
1581→        mEditorNote!!.values()[0] = oldValue
1582→    }

1600→    private fun setDid(note: Note?) {
1601→        // If the target deck ID has already been set, we use that value and avoid trying to
1602→        // determine what it should be again. An existing value means we are resuming the activity
1603→        // where the target deck was already decided by the user.
1604→        if (deckId != 0L) {
1605→            mDeckSpinnerSelection!!.selectDeckById(deckId, false)
1606→            return
1607→        }
1608→        if (note == null || addNote || mCurrentEditedCard == null) {
1609→            val model = getColUnsafe.notetypes.current()
1610→            if (getColUnsafe.config.getBool(ConfigKey.Bool.ADDING_DEFAULTS_TO_CURRENT_DECK)) {
1611→                deckId = getColUnsafe.config.get(CURRENT_DECK) ?: 1
1612→                if (getColUnsafe.decks.isDyn(deckId)) {
1613→                    /*
1614→                     * If the deck in mCurrentDid is a filtered (dynamic) deck, then we can't create cards in it,
1615→                     * and we set mCurrentDid to the Default deck. Otherwise, we keep the number that had been
1616→                     * selected previously in the activity.
1617→                     */
1618→                    deckId = 1
1619→                }
1620→            } else {
1621→                deckId = model.did
1622→            }
1623→        } else {
1624→            deckId = mCurrentEditedCard!!.did
1625→        }
1626→        mDeckSpinnerSelection!!.selectDeckById(deckId, false)
1627→    }

1637→            val model = getColUnsafe.notetypes.current()
1638→            Note(getColUnsafe, model)

1640→            note

1643→            mSelectedTags = mEditorNote!!.tags
1644→        }
1645→        // nb: setOnItemSelectedListener and populateEditFields need to occur after this
1646→        setNoteTypePosition()
1647→        setDid(note)
1648→        updateTags()
1649→        updateCards(mEditorNote!!.model())
1650→        updateToolbar()
1651→        populateEditFields(changeType, false)
1652→        updateFieldsFromStickyText()
1653→    }
1654→
1655→    private fun updateToolbar() {
1656→        val editorLayout = findViewById<View>(R.id.note_editor_layout)
1657→        val bottomMargin =
1658→            if (shouldHideToolbar()) {
1659→                0
1660→            } else {
1661→                resources.getDimension(R.dimen.note_editor_toolbar_height)
1662→                    .toInt()
1663→            }
1664→        val params = editorLayout.layoutParams as MarginLayoutParams
1665→        params.bottomMargin = bottomMargin
1666→        editorLayout.layoutParams = params
1667→        if (shouldHideToolbar()) {
1668→            toolbar.visibility = View.GONE
1669→            return
1670→        } else {
1671→            toolbar.visibility = View.VISIBLE
1672→        }
1673→        toolbar.clearCustomItems()
1674→        if (mEditorNote!!.model().isCloze) {
1675→            val clozeFormatter = Toolbar.TextFormatter { s: String ->
1676→                val stringFormat = Toolbar.StringFormat()
1677→                val prefix = "{{c$nextClozeIndex::"
1678→                stringFormat.result = "$prefix$s}}"
1679→                if (s.isEmpty()) {
1680→                    stringFormat.selectionStart = prefix.length
1681→                    stringFormat.selectionEnd = prefix.length
1682→                } else {
1683→                    stringFormat.selectionStart = 0
1684→                    stringFormat.selectionEnd = stringFormat.result.length
1685→                }
1686→                stringFormat
1687→            }
1688→
1689→            val clozeDrawable = ResourcesCompat.getDrawable(resources, R.drawable.ic_cloze_black_24dp, null)
1690→            clozeDrawable!!.setTint(Themes.getColorFromAttr(this@NoteEditor, R.attr.toolbarIconColor))
1691→            val clozeButton = toolbar.insertItem(0, clozeDrawable, Runnable { toolbar.onFormat(clozeFormatter) })
1692→            clozeButton.contentDescription = resources.getString(R.string.insert_cloze)
1693→            TooltipCompat.setTooltipText(clozeButton, resources.getString(R.string.insert_cloze))
1694→        }
1695→        val buttons = toolbarButtons
1696→        for (b in buttons) {
1697→            // 0th button shows as '1' and is Ctrl + 1
1698→            val visualIndex = b.index + 1
1699→            var text = visualIndex.toString()
1700→            if (b.buttonText.isNotEmpty()) {
1701→                text = b.buttonText
1702→            }
1703→            val bmp = toolbar.createDrawableForString(text)
1704→            val v = toolbar.insertItem(0, bmp, b.toFormatter())
1705→            v.contentDescription = text
1706→
1707→            // Allow Ctrl + 1...Ctrl + 0 for item 10.
1708→            v.tag = (visualIndex % 10).toString()
1709→            v.setOnLongClickListener {
1710→                displayEditToolbarDialog(b)
1711→                true
1712→            }
1713→        }
1714→
1715→        // Let the user add more buttons (always at the end).
1716→        // Sets the add custom tag icon color.
1717→        val drawable = ResourcesCompat.getDrawable(resources, R.drawable.ic_add_toolbar_icon, null)
1718→        drawable!!.setTint(Themes.getColorFromAttr(this@NoteEditor, R.attr.toolbarIconColor))
1719→        val addButton = toolbar.insertItem(0, drawable, Runnable { displayAddToolbarDialog() })
1720→        addButton.contentDescription = resources.getString(R.string.add_toolbar_item)
1721→        TooltipCompat.setTooltipText(addButton, resources.getString(R.string.add_toolbar_item))
1722→    }
1723→
1724→    private val toolbarButtons: ArrayList<CustomToolbarButton>
1725→        get() {
1726→            val set = this.sharedPrefs()
1727→                .getStringSet(PREF_NOTE_EDITOR_CUSTOM_BUTTONS, HashUtil.HashSetInit(0))
1728→            return CustomToolbarButton.fromStringSet(set!!)

1731→    private fun saveToolbarButtons(buttons: ArrayList<CustomToolbarButton>) {
1732→        this.sharedPrefs().edit {
1733→            putStringSet(PREF_NOTE_EDITOR_CUSTOM_BUTTONS, CustomToolbarButton.toStringSet(buttons))
1734→        }

1737→    private fun addToolbarButton(buttonText: String, prefix: String, suffix: String) {
1738→        if (prefix.isEmpty() && suffix.isEmpty()) return
1739→        val toolbarButtons = toolbarButtons
1740→        toolbarButtons.add(CustomToolbarButton(toolbarButtons.size, buttonText, prefix, suffix))
1741→        saveToolbarButtons(toolbarButtons)
1742→        updateToolbar()

1745→    private fun editToolbarButton(
1746→        buttonText: String,

1748→        suffix: String,

1750→    ) {
1751→        val toolbarButtons = toolbarButtons
1752→        val currentButtonIndex = currentButton.index
1753→
1754→        toolbarButtons[currentButtonIndex] = CustomToolbarButton(
1755→            index = currentButtonIndex,
1756→            buttonText = buttonText.ifEmpty { currentButton.buttonText },
1757→            prefix = prefix.ifEmpty { currentButton.prefix },
1758→            suffix = suffix.ifEmpty { currentButton.suffix }

1760→
1761→        saveToolbarButtons(toolbarButtons)

1765→    private fun suggestRemoveButton(
1766→        button: CustomToolbarButton,
1767→        editToolbarItemDialog: AlertDialog
1768→    ) {
1769→        AlertDialog.Builder(this).show {
1770→            title(R.string.remove_toolbar_item)
1771→            positiveButton(R.string.dialog_positive_delete) {

1774→            }
1775→            negativeButton(R.string.dialog_cancel)
1776→        }
1777→    }

1779→    private fun removeButton(button: CustomToolbarButton) {
1780→        val toolbarButtons = toolbarButtons
1781→        toolbarButtons.removeAt(button.index)
1782→        saveToolbarButtons(toolbarButtons)
1783→        updateToolbar()

1786→    private val toolbarDialog: AlertDialog.Builder
1787→        get() = AlertDialog.Builder(this)

1789→                openUrl(Uri.parse(getString(R.string.link_manual_note_format_toolbar)))
1790→            }
1791→            .negativeButton(R.string.dialog_cancel)

1793→    private fun displayAddToolbarDialog() {
1794→        val v = layoutInflater.inflate(R.layout.note_editor_toolbar_add_custom_item, null)
1795→        toolbarDialog.show {
1796→            title(R.string.add_toolbar_item)
1797→            setView(v)
1798→            positiveButton(R.string.dialog_positive_create) {
1799→                val etIcon = v.findViewById<EditText>(R.id.note_editor_toolbar_item_icon)
1800→                val et = v.findViewById<EditText>(R.id.note_editor_toolbar_before)
1801→                val et2 = v.findViewById<EditText>(R.id.note_editor_toolbar_after)

1807→    private fun displayEditToolbarDialog(currentButton: CustomToolbarButton) {
1808→        val view = layoutInflater.inflate(R.layout.note_editor_toolbar_edit_custom_item, null)
1809→        val etIcon = view.findViewById<EditText>(R.id.note_editor_toolbar_item_icon)
1810→        val et = view.findViewById<EditText>(R.id.note_editor_toolbar_before)
1811→        val et2 = view.findViewById<EditText>(R.id.note_editor_toolbar_after)

1816→        val editToolbarDialog = toolbarDialog

1818→            .positiveButton(R.string.save) {

1826→            .create()

1836→    private fun setNoteTypePosition() {
1837→        // Set current note type and deck positions in spinners
1838→        val position = mAllModelIds!!.indexOf(mEditorNote!!.model().getLong("id"))
1839→        // set selection without firing selectionChanged event
1840→        mNoteTypeSpinner!!.setSelection(position, false)

1843→    private fun updateTags() {
1844→        if (mSelectedTags == null) {
1845→            mSelectedTags = ArrayList(0)
1846→        }
1847→        mTagsButton!!.text = resources.getString(
1848→            R.string.CardEditorTags,
1849→            getColUnsafe.tags.join(getColUnsafe.tags.canonify(mSelectedTags!!)).trim { it <= ' ' }.replace(" ", ", ")
1850→        )
1851→    }
1852→
1853→    /** Update the list of card templates for current note type  */
1854→    private fun updateCards(model: JSONObject?) {
1855→        Timber.d("updateCards()")
1856→        val tmpls = model!!.getJSONArray("tmpls")
1857→        var cardsList = StringBuilder()
1858→        // Build comma separated list of card names
1859→        Timber.d("updateCards() template count is %s", tmpls.length())
1860→        for (i in 0 until tmpls.length()) {
1861→            var name = tmpls.getJSONObject(i).optString("name")
1862→            // If more than one card, and we have an existing card, underline existing card
1863→            if (!addNote && tmpls.length() > 1 && model === mEditorNote!!.model() && mCurrentEditedCard != null && mCurrentEditedCard!!.template()
1864→                .optString("name") == name
1865→            ) {
1866→                name = "<u>$name</u>"
1867→            }
1868→            cardsList.append(name)
1869→            if (i < tmpls.length() - 1) {
1870→                cardsList.append(", ")
1871→            }
1872→        }
1873→        // Make cards list red if the number of cards is being reduced
1874→        if (!addNote && tmpls.length() < mEditorNote!!.model().getJSONArray("tmpls").length()) {
1875→            cardsList = StringBuilder("<font color='red'>$cardsList</font>")
1876→        }
1877→        mCardsButton!!.text = HtmlCompat.fromHtml(
1878→            resources.getString(R.string.CardEditorCards, cardsList.toString()),
1879→            HtmlCompat.FROM_HTML_MODE_LEGACY
1880→        )
1881→    }
1882→
1883→    private fun updateField(field: FieldEditText?): Boolean {
1884→        val fieldContent = field!!.text?.toString() ?: ""
1885→        val correctedFieldContent = NoteService.convertToHtmlNewline(fieldContent, shouldReplaceNewlines())
1886→        if (mEditorNote!!.values()[field.ord] != correctedFieldContent) {
1887→            mEditorNote!!.values()[field.ord] = correctedFieldContent
1888→            return true
1889→        }
1890→        return false
1891→    }
1892→

1894→        return tags.joinToString(" ")
1895→    }
